issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with activation cost specification. DSL missing the activation condition that this is a Main phase activated ability requiring rest.
Action missing the prerequisite condition 'rest this Character'. The ability requires resting this card as activation cost, not just choosing to rest it.
Target should clarify 'maxCount: 1' explicitly (up to 1). Current DSL only specifies maxCost.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less.

conditions.description: Can only activate if not already resting
